title: Hieracium magnauricula

intro: Hieracium magnauricula, also known as Golden Saxifrage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, thanks to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium magnauricula include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its therapeutic effects. In traditional medicine, Hieracium magnauricula is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in modern herbalism to support the treatment of various health conditions, including gastrointestinal disorders and skin problems.
